description: A Class A artifact missing a required field (here: canonicalization) MUST receive INVALID status. Required-field omission is a structural failure independent of digest comparison.

input.claim: this artifact matches its declared origin digest

why: WiseOrder Protocol v0.1.0 invariant A2 requires Class A artifacts to declare canonicalization scheme, hash algorithm, expected digest, and observed digest. Omitting the canonicalization field violates A2 and CS1 — status MUST be INVALID regardless of whether the digests would otherwise have matched.
